zh.lifeSummary: Anne Joan Halsham是Sir. John Halsham和Maud Mawley的女兒，於1383年出生在英國素可韋斯特 格林斯亞德。她於1399年與John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst在英國素福爾可拉特萊斯登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年11月24日之後在英國英格蘭素可，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可維斯特布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anne Joan Halsham是Sir. John Halsham和Maud Mawley的女儿，于1383年出生在英国素可韋斯特 格林斯亞德。她于1399年与John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst在英国素福爾可拉特萊斯登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1449年11月24日之后在英国英格兰素可，埋葬在英国英格兰素可維斯特布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Halsham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Haysom
meanings: English: (i) locative name, perhaps from Haysend in Tamerton Foliot (Devon), recorded in the surname of John de Hayeshende, 1332 in Subsidy Rolls (Devon). The alteration of -send to -som and -son would be unexceptional. (ii) alternatively it might, like Heesom , be an altered form of Eastham , but the evidence is inconclusive. (iii) possibly a variant of Hayson (2), but medieval names in -son are rare in SW England, where this surname is mainly found.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Anne Joan Halsham was born in 1383, in West Grinstead, Sussex, England as the daughter of Sir. John Halsham and Maud Mawley. She married John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst in 1399, in Rattlesden, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 24 November 1449, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Westbourne, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Anne Joan Halsham est née en 1383, à West Grinstead, Sussex, Angleterre, fille de Sir. John Halsham et Maud Mawley. Elle a épousé John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst en 1399, à Rattlesden, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 24 novembre 1449, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Westbourne, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Anne Joan Halsham wurde 1383 in West Grinstead, Sussex, England, als Tochter von Sir. John Halsham und Maud Mawley geboren. Sie hat 1399 in Rattlesden, Suffolk, England John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 24. November 1449 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Westbourne, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Anne Joan Halsham è nata il nel 1383 nel West Grinstead, Sussex, England come figlia di Sir. John Halsham e Maud Mawley. Lei sposato John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst nel 1399, nel Rattlesden, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 24 novembre 1449, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Westbourne, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Joan Halshamは1383年にイギリススセックスウエスト グリンステアドでSir. John HalshamとMaud Mawleyの娘として生まれた。1399年にイギリススフォルクラットレスデンでJohn de Bohun II,   of Midhurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年11月24日以後にイギリスイギリススセックスで死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスウエストボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Joan Halsham(은)는 1383년 영국 수세스 웨스트 그린스테아드에서 Sir. John Halsham(와)과 Maud Mawley의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1399년 영국 수폴크 래틀레즈든에서 John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 11월 24일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 웨스트보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anne Joan Halsham nasceu em 1383, em West Grinstead, Sussex, Inglaterra filha de Sir. John Halsham e Maud Mawley. Ela casou-se com John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst em 1399, em Rattlesden, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 24 de novembro de 1449, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Westbourne, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne Joan Halsham родилась в 1383 г. в местности вест гринстид, суссекс, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir. John Halsham и Maud Mawley. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst в 1399 г. в местности раттлесден, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 24 ноябрь 1449 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности вестбурн, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
